## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Flosum and GrowthX to discuss ongoing projects, updates, and strategies.](https://fathom.video/share/qFM1CDoLTQ8CZnj5WasP3LSzYRvU5v_S?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Redirect list completed by Jacob, cleaning up \~90% of 404 errors; to be re-checked in 2-4 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/qFM1CDoLTQ8CZnj5WasP3LSzYRvU5v_S?tab=summary&timestamp=152.0)
  - [Webflow publishing issues encountered; potentially due to bandwidth limitations](https://fathom.video/share/qFM1CDoLTQ8CZnj5WasP3LSzYRvU5v_S?tab=summary&timestamp=1097.0)
  - [New Looker Studio dashboards in development for improved reporting and insights](https://fathom.video/share/qFM1CDoLTQ8CZnj5WasP3LSzYRvU5v_S?tab=summary&timestamp=1268.0)
  - [Monthly deep-dive sessions and quarterly review planned to analyze performance and strategy](https://fathom.video/share/qFM1CDoLTQ8CZnj5WasP3LSzYRvU5v_S?tab=summary&timestamp=1478.0)

## Topics

### Redirect List Completion

  - [Jacob finished the redirect list with about a dozen redirects](https://fathom.video/share/qFM1CDoLTQ8CZnj5WasP3LSzYRvU5v_S?tab=summary&timestamp=166.0)
  - [Largely batched quickly, focusing on blog, resources, and customer stories](https://fathom.video/share/qFM1CDoLTQ8CZnj5WasP3LSzYRvU5v_S?tab=summary&timestamp=171.0)
  - [Low risk due to low/zero traffic on affected pages](https://fathom.video/share/qFM1CDoLTQ8CZnj5WasP3LSzYRvU5v_S?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Plan to rerun in 2-4 weeks to check for new issues after re-crawling and indexing](https://fathom.video/share/qFM1CDoLTQ8CZnj5WasP3LSzYRvU5v_S?tab=summary&timestamp=235.0)

### URL Validation and Segmentation

  - [Beau inquired about URL validation tools for the Warmly platform](https://fathom.video/share/qFM1CDoLTQ8CZnj5WasP3LSzYRvU5v_S?tab=summary&timestamp=386.0)
  - [Discussion on cleaning up old URLs and redirecting to newer, more relevant content](https://fathom.video/share/qFM1CDoLTQ8CZnj5WasP3LSzYRvU5v_S?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Exploration of Ahrefs and Screaming Frog as potential tools for URL validation](https://fathom.video/share/qFM1CDoLTQ8CZnj5WasP3LSzYRvU5v_S?tab=summary&timestamp=427.0)
  - [Importance of segmenting de-anonymized traffic for NERFA programs and lead scoring](https://fathom.video/share/qFM1CDoLTQ8CZnj5WasP3LSzYRvU5v_S?tab=summary&timestamp=483.0)

### Webflow Publishing Issues

  - [Rachel encountered problems publishing approved articles in Webflow](https://fathom.video/share/qFM1CDoLTQ8CZnj5WasP3LSzYRvU5v_S?tab=summary&timestamp=1097.0)
  - [Platform kept kicking her out and preventing content updates](https://fathom.video/share/qFM1CDoLTQ8CZnj5WasP3LSzYRvU5v_S?tab=summary&timestamp=1102.0)
  - [Saakshi suggested it might be a bandwidth issue, potentially requiring an upgrade](https://fathom.video/share/qFM1CDoLTQ8CZnj5WasP3LSzYRvU5v_S?tab=summary&timestamp=1186.0)
  - [Rachel to try clearing cookies and attempt publishing again](https://fathom.video/share/qFM1CDoLTQ8CZnj5WasP3LSzYRvU5v_S?tab=summary&timestamp=1235.0)

### Looker Studio Reporting

  - [Current Looker Studio dashboard not functioning optimally](https://fathom.video/share/qFM1CDoLTQ8CZnj5WasP3LSzYRvU5v_S?tab=summary&timestamp=1283.0)
  - [New dashboards in development with more depth and value](https://fathom.video/share/qFM1CDoLTQ8CZnj5WasP3LSzYRvU5v_S?tab=summary&timestamp=1302.0)
  - [Timeline: V1 expected by next week, with ongoing improvements over the next month](https://fathom.video/share/qFM1CDoLTQ8CZnj5WasP3LSzYRvU5v_S?tab=summary&timestamp=1322.0)
  - [Plan to dedicate one call per month for in-depth data analysis and insights](https://fathom.video/share/qFM1CDoLTQ8CZnj5WasP3LSzYRvU5v_S?tab=summary&timestamp=1394.0)

### Meeting Cadence and Strategy Review

  - [Proposed new meeting structure: 3 regular syncs, 1 deep-dive session per month](https://fathom.video/share/qFM1CDoLTQ8CZnj5WasP3LSzYRvU5v_S?tab=summary&timestamp=1408.0)
  - [Quarterly business review (QBR) planned before the end of August](https://fathom.video/share/qFM1CDoLTQ8CZnj5WasP3LSzYRvU5v_S?tab=summary&timestamp=1493.0)
  - [Aim to analyze overall strategy, identify gaps, and potentially adjust focus areas](https://fathom.video/share/qFM1CDoLTQ8CZnj5WasP3LSzYRvU5v_S?tab=summary&timestamp=1506.0)

### DevOps Compliance Content

  - [Saakshi requested creation of Dora compliance content for DevOps](https://fathom.video/share/qFM1CDoLTQ8CZnj5WasP3LSzYRvU5v_S?tab=summary&timestamp=1640.0)
  - [Suggested a generic approach with organic inclusion of Flosum where relevant](https://fathom.video/share/qFM1CDoLTQ8CZnj5WasP3LSzYRvU5v_S?tab=summary&timestamp=1651.0)
  - [Offered additional information if needed by the content team](https://fathom.video/share/qFM1CDoLTQ8CZnj5WasP3LSzYRvU5v_S?tab=summary&timestamp=1657.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Rachel to clear cookies and attempt Webflow publishing again, updating Saakshi on results](https://fathom.video/share/qFM1CDoLTQ8CZnj5WasP3LSzYRvU5v_S?tab=summary&timestamp=1235.0)
  - [Jacob to provide step-by-step guide for URL validation using Ahrefs or alternative tools](https://fathom.video/share/qFM1CDoLTQ8CZnj5WasP3LSzYRvU5v_S?tab=summary&timestamp=641.0)
  - [Beau to prepare reports on page visits and lead data from Warmly platform](https://fathom.video/share/qFM1CDoLTQ8CZnj5WasP3LSzYRvU5v_S?tab=summary&timestamp=483.0)
  - [GrowthX team to continue development of new Looker Studio dashboards](https://fathom.video/share/qFM1CDoLTQ8CZnj5WasP3LSzYRvU5v_S?tab=summary&timestamp=1302.0)
  - [Schedule QBR and first deep-dive session before end of August](https://fathom.video/share/qFM1CDoLTQ8CZnj5WasP3LSzYRvU5v_S?tab=summary&timestamp=1493.0)
  - [Flosum team to review proposed meeting cadence and provide feedback](https://fathom.video/share/qFM1CDoLTQ8CZnj5WasP3LSzYRvU5v_S?tab=summary&timestamp=1627.0)
  - [GrowthX to begin work on DevOps Dora compliance content, reaching out if more info needed](https://fathom.video/share/qFM1CDoLTQ8CZnj5WasP3LSzYRvU5v_S?tab=summary&timestamp=1640.0)
